summary: Restore seed markers and remove AORT_SEED_BROKEN trailers from allowlisted seeded files. Sets ResourceJudgeMarker to judge-resource-complete and removes broken compile breaks from gen_*.go files.
patch:
diff --git a/internal/codebasedag/judge_resource.go b/internal/codebasedag/judge_resource.go
--- a/internal/codebasedag/judge_resource.go
+++ b/internal/codebasedag/judge_resource.go
@@ -3,3 +3,3 @@
 // ResourceJudgeMarker is flipped by live DAG agents from seed-incomplete to complete.
-const ResourceJudgeMarker = "seed-incomplete"
+const ResourceJudgeMarker = "judge-resource-complete"
 
diff --git a/internal/codebasedag/resourceagent/chunk001/gen_audit_log_002.go b/internal/codebasedag/resourceagent/chunk001/gen_audit_log_002.go
--- a/internal/codebasedag/resourceagent/chunk001/gen_audit_log_002.go
+++ b/internal/codebasedag/resourceagent/chunk001/gen_audit_log_002.go
@@ -388,4 +388,2 @@
 // hashing, redaction, validation, and test vectors.
 
-// AORT_SEED_BROKEN: intentional compile break for live restore
-var _ = __aort_seed_broken_undefined__
diff --git a/internal/codebasedag/resourceagent/chunk008/gen_capsule_notes_012.go b/internal/codebasedag/resourceagent/chunk008/gen_capsule_notes_012.go
--- a/internal/codebasedag/resourceagent/chunk008/gen_capsule_notes_012.go
+++ b/internal/codebasedag/resourceagent/chunk008/gen_capsule_notes_012.go
@@ -360,4 +360,2 @@
 }
 
-// AORT_SEED_BROKEN: intentional compile break for live restore
-var _ = __aort_seed_broken_undefined__
diff --git a/internal/codebasedag/resourceagent/chunk015/gen_fault_memory_003.go b/internal/codebasedag/resourceagent/chunk015/gen_fault_memory_003.go
--- a/internal/codebasedag/resourceagent/chunk015/gen_fault_memory_003.go
+++ b/internal/codebasedag/resourceagent/chunk015/gen_fault_memory_003.go
@@ -460,4 +460,2 @@
 }
 
-// AORT_SEED_BROKEN: intentional compile break for live restore
-var _ = __aort_seed_broken_undefined__
